name: Waldorf Salad (Rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Mix well until all components are evenly distributed.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate until serving time.
4. Serve in 9 half-cup portions.
(Note: This slimmed-down apple lovers' favorite uses creamy low-fat lemon yogurt to replace fat and calorie-rich mayonnaise.)
